components.title: Zero-Knowledge Architecture
components.subtitle: Two Lambda functions. One storage abstraction. Client-side encryption always.

items.title: Browser (You)
items.body: Web Crypto API generates AES-256-GCM keys locally. Files encrypted before any network call. Key never transmitted.

items.title: Lambda + S3 (Server)
items.body: Stores only encrypted ciphertext. No filenames. No keys. No plaintext — ever. Two Lambda functions: Public and Admin.

items.title: Recipient (Them)
items.body: Receives share token out-of-band. Browser decrypts locally. Zero server involvement in the decryption path.

components.title: Memory-FS storage abstraction
components.body: Application code has no idea whether storage is memory, disk, or S3. Swap backends without touching business logic.
